name: Shanghai Fortune Techgroup Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Fortune Techgroup Co., Ltd. provides semiconductor products and solutions in China. Its products include wired and wireless communications, radio frequency and power amplifier type of components, sensors and others, as well as module for NBIoT (5G) usage. It provides various solutions for smart home, smart cities, surveillance, and finger print identification applications. Shanghai Fortune Techgroup Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Shanghai, China.
